title: Too many Advancements (TMA)
description: Immerse yourself in a world where doing almost anything is an advancement!
body:
# Enter an immersive world of wonder
**Too Many Advancements (TMA)** is a mod that will add lots of new advancements, some for already added features, and some for features that the mod adds, from standing on blocks, to placing them, this mod will guarantee your delight

## 📃 Installation guide
Simply install this mod, and put it into .minecraft in the 'mods' folder!

## 💥 Dependancies
Nothing except this mod

## 🪶 Features
- Slimy feather
- Charred slimy feather
- Glue
- Gloop
- Many advancements
- Game breaker (CREATIVE MODE ONLY)
